title: Vera Bradley (VRA) Reports Q1 Loss, Lags Revenue Estimates
text: Vera Bradley's consolidated revenues for Q1 2024 totaled $80.6 million with a net loss of $6.5 million. Outlet channel traffic challenges contributed to a 4% decline in direct revenues. Wholesale partners' cautious inventory buys led to a 25% decrease in Vera Bradley indirect revenues. Pura Vida faced a significant 37% sales decline due to lower e-commerce and wholesale revenues. Earnings per share were -$0.19 compared to expectations of -$0.20, slightly beating earnings expectations. Looking forward, the company provided financial projections for fiscal year 2024, expecting revenue of $500 million and diluted earnings per share of $0.54 to $0.62, while anticipating a stronger second half of the year.
